You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/create-storage-system/create-storage-system-steps/capacity-and-nodes-step/capacity-and-nodes-step.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 95
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-label]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Label> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Label> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Label variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Label>
  After:  <Label variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Label> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Label><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Label>
  After:  <Label icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Label>

Incident context:
  componentName: Label
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: react-i18next
  parentName: Trans

content.text: All usages are correct. Let me also confirm that the empty `<TextContent />` on old line 366 was properly removed:

Good — the empty `<TextContent />` (old line 366) was correctly removed. The structure now has the inner `<Content component={ContentVariants.small}>` wrapped by a single `<Content>` wrapper, with no empty self-closing tag.

Let me also verify the Label on line 95 area is intact (Fix 1 was not applicable):

The Label line is intact and unchanged — correct, since the `{{ label }}` inside it is a react-i18next interpolation variable, not an icon component. ## Changes Applied ### Fix 1 — `sd-icon-children-to-prop-label` (Line 95) **Could not apply.** The `` at line 95 contains a react-i18next interpolation variable (`{{ label }}`), not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule requires moving icon children to the `icon` prop, but there is no icon element here. No change needed. ### Fix 2 — `TextVariants` removed, migrate to `ContentVariants` (Line 56) **Applied.** - Changed import: `TextVariants` → `ContentVariants` - Updated all 5 JSX usages: `TextVariants.h3` → `ContentVariants.h3`, `TextVariants.small` → `ContentVariants.small` ### Fix 3 — Replace `` with `` (Line 54) **Applied.** - Changed import: `Text` → `Content` - Replaced all `` / `` JSX elements with `` / `` - For bare `` (no `component` prop, which defaults to `

`), added `component={ContentVariants.p}` to preserve the paragraph rendering behavior - For ``, kept the `component` prop with updated `ContentVariants` ### Fix 4 — Replace `` with `` (Line 57) **Applied.** - Removed `TextContent` from the import (merged into the single `Content` import) - Replaced all `` / `` JSX elements with `` / `` (which renders as `

` by default, same as `TextContent`) - Removed the empty self-closing `` (old line 366) as it served no purpose - Where `` wrapped a single ``, collapsed to a single `` (e.g., `...` → `...`)
